activities.description: Decide what subjects/themes the issue will cover
activities.rationale: AI trend tools can surface ideas but editorial judgment drives final selection

activities.description: Distribute articles and tasks to writers/contributors
activities.rationale: Requires knowledge of contributor strengths, workload, and relationships

activities.description: Gather facts, sources, and background for an article
activities.rationale: AI research tools exist but hallucination risk is real — verify all AI-sourced facts

activities.description: Write the main narrative or feature content
activities.rationale: Strong AI drafting tools available; human editing of voice and accuracy still essential
Multiple A/B testing and AI copy tools available; low risk, high speed gain

activities.description: Write the snippet shown in email clients before open
activities.rationale: Same tooling as subject lines; quick win with minimal editorial consequence

activities.description: Review structure, argument, and overall clarity of drafts
activities.rationale: AI editing tools can flag issues but cannot replace editorial judgment on voice and mission fit

activities.description: Check grammar, spelling, punctuation, and style guide compliance
activities.rationale: Highest-confidence AI editorial task — accuracy is high and errors are catchable

activities.description: Verify factual statements, figures, and attributions
activities.rationale: AI fact-checking tools are early-stage; hallucination risk makes this human-owned until tools mature

activities.description: Find, license, or select images for articles
activities.rationale: AI image search and stock tools help, but rights clearance and brand fit need human review

activities.description: Create original images using AI image generation
activities.rationale: Tools are capable but brand consistency, copyright provenance, and accuracy require human oversight policy

activities.description: Arrange content blocks and visual hierarchy in the email template
activities.rationale: AI layout suggestions exist in some platforms; not yet mature enough for hands-off use

activities.description: Define audience segments for targeted sends
activities.rationale: ESP platforms offer AI segmentation; test with low-stakes segments before full deployment

activities.description: Customize content blocks or subject lines per recipient segment
activities.rationale: Dynamic content and AI personalization widely available; brand voice consistency is the key risk

activities.description: Set optimal send time and trigger delivery
activities.rationale: Send-time optimization is standard in most ESPs; no reason not to use it

activities.description: Track open rates, click rates, unsubscribes in real time
activities.rationale: Fully automated in all major ESPs; AI anomaly detection is an emerging add-on

activities.description: Produce a written summary of issue performance
activities.rationale: AI can generate first-draft performance summaries from structured data

activities.description: Identify what to change based on performance data
activities.rationale: AI recommendations are improving but strategic interpretation benefits from human context
